subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-07-06
subcodes.first_line: In the world of existence man has traversed successive degrees until he has attained the human kingdom. In each degree of his progression
subcodes.first_line_orig: انسان در عالم وجود طی مراتب کرده است تا بعالم انسانی رسیده است در هر رتبه
subcodes.subjects: @evolution; human evolution, @transcending the material condition, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
